title: ATS Infrastructure is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ATS Infrastructure is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
